enrich_one_or_many_contacts_through_apol: Enrich one or many contacts through Apollo to refresh titles, emails, phones, and company data. Use to keep CRM records accurate before outreach.

integrates_apollo_io_into_the_workflow_s: Integrates Apollo.io into the workflow. Search for people and companies, enrich contact data, manage your CRM contacts and accounts, add contacts to sequences, and create tasks.

search_apollo_for_people_matching_an_ide: Search Apollo for people matching an ideal customer profile and produce a targeted prospect list. Use for outbound prospecting and territory building.
search_apollo_opportunities_by_stage_and: Search Apollo opportunities by stage and summarize new and at-risk deals into a digest. Use for recurring pipeline reviews.
